things.name: Tel Aviv Beaches
things.description: 16km of sandy Mediterranean beaches with vibrant beach culture and watersports

things.name: Old Jaffa (Yafo)
things.description: Ancient port city with winding alleyways, art galleries and the famous Jaffa flea market

things.name: Carmel Market (Shuk HaCarmel)
things.description: Tel Aviv's most colourful market with street food, spices and Israeli produce

things.name: White City Bauhaus Architecture
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage largest concentration of Bauhaus buildings in the world

things.name: Neve Tzedek
things.description: Tel Aviv's first neighbourhood, now a bohemian district of boutiques and art galleries

things.name: Tel Aviv Museum of Art
things.description: Leading museum with Israeli and international art including Impressionism and Abstract

things.name: Rothschild Boulevard
things.description: Tree-lined boulevard with Bauhaus architecture, cafes and the Declaration of Independence site

things.name: Sarona Market
things.description: Upmarket food and lifestyle market in a restored German Templar colony

things.name: Independence Hall
things.description: Where David Ben-Gurion declared the State of Israel in 1948

things.name: Florentin
things.description: Gritty street art neighbourhood with the city's most creative bars and galleries
